message:
fix(parity): count_nonzero scalar type and split zero-sections error

- count_nonzero: return np.int64 scalar instead of Python int for axis=None
- split: distinguish error types for sections=0 based on function:
  - split/hsplit/vsplit/dsplit: ZeroDivisionError (matches NumPy)
  - array_split: ValueError (matches NumPy)

fnp-python: 135/135 tests now pass (was 133/135)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
